message.content:
{
  "archetype": "The Dorm Dynamo",
  "read": "Maria, you're a driven college student who's eager to upgrade your physical game without breaking the bank. You're not a morning person, but you're willing to make sacrifices for a healthier, more confident you. Your vibe is energetic, entrepreneurial, and resourceful.",
  "modalities_youll_enjoy": [
    "bodyweight exercises",
    "home workouts",
    "outdoor activities (parks, streets, etc.)"
  ],
  "first_week_suggestion": "Dedicate 20 minutes, 3 times a week, to gentle morning exercises like push-ups, squats, and jumping jacks in your dorm room. Use your phone's timer and a yoga mat for makeshift space. As the week progresses, aim to increase the duration by 5 minutes. Don't forget to stretch afterwards!",
  "watch_out_for": "Don't get too hard on yourself, especially on busy weekdays. A 20-minute workout is a great start, but remember to listen to your body and rest when needed. Prioritize self-care and don't sacrifice sleep for exercise."
